title: Dashboard Walkthrough
description: Interactive walkthrough of a dashboard with clicks, scrolls and explanations

steps.title: Introduction
steps.narration: Welcome to the dashboard walkthrough. We will explore the main sections and interact with key elements.

steps.title: Explain analytics
steps.narration: The analytics section shows real-time metrics. Charts update automatically as new data comes in.

steps.title: Explain bottom section
steps.narration: Below the charts, you can see detailed tables with export options and filters.

steps.title: Show details
steps.narration: Clicking on a row opens its detail view. From here, you can edit, export or archive the record.

steps.title: Conclusion
steps.narration: That wraps up the dashboard walkthrough. The interface is designed to be intuitive and efficient.
